ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 🟢 Server running on port 4444 — your devices can connect.
ast.target: 🟢 服务器运行中，端口 4444 — 您的设备可以连接。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: 🔴 Server not running. Start it below to enable local sync.
ast.target: 🔴 服务器未运行。请在下方启动以启用本地同步。

ast.name: confirm
ast.source:
⚠️ Are you sure you want to reconstruct the server database?

This will purge all server-side document history binaries and recreate them from your current local files. Other connected devices will temporarily disconnect and automatically resync.
ast.target: ⚠️ 您确定要重建服务器数据库吗？\n\n这将清除所有服务器端的文档历史记录二进制文件，并从您当前的本地文件重新创建它们。其他已连接的设备将暂时断开连接，并自动重新同步。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组 (Uint8Array) 支持。如果您需要支持旧版浏览器，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: error
ast.source: [yjs] Tried to remove event handler that doesn't exist.
ast.target: [yjs] 尝试移除不存在的事件处理器。

ast.name: error
ast.source: This document was already integrated as a sub-document. You should create a second instance instead with the same guid.
ast.target: 此文档已作为子文档集成。您应该使用相同的 guid 创建第二个实例。

ast.name: error
ast.source: Yjs was already imported. This breaks constructor checks and will lead to issues! - https://github.com/yjs/yjs/issues/438
ast.target: Yjs 已被导入。这会破坏构造函数检查并导致问题！- https://github.com/yjs/yjs/issues/438

ast.name: error
ast.source: Caught error while handling a Yjs update
ast.target: 处理 Yjs 更新时捕获到错误

ast.name: log
ast.source: [LiveCursor] Local URL configured. Auto-starting local sync server in the background.
ast.target: [LiveCursor] 已配置本地 URL。正在后台自动启动本地同步服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name shown next to your cursor on other devices.
ast.target: 在其他设备上您的光标旁显示的名称。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your cursor and selection highlight color.
ast.target: 您的光标和选区高亮颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Runs a private sync server on your PC. All your devices on the same network connect through it.
ast.target: 在您的电脑上运行一个私有同步服务器。您在同一网络上的所有设备都通过它连接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: All devices must use the exact same room name to collaborate together.
ast.target: 所有设备必须使用完全相同的房间名称才能一起协作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The WebSocket server all your devices connect to. Default: ws://localhost:4444 (local server on this PC).
ast.target: 您的所有设备连接的 WebSocket 服务器。默认：ws://localhost:4444（此电脑上的本地服务器）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Force a reconnection to the server with current settings.
ast.target: 使用当前设置强制重新连接到服务器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Synchronize plugins, themes, snippets, and all configuration files to the server database. This happens automatically in the background, but you can force it here.
ast.target: 将插件、主题、代码片段和所有配置文件同步到服务器数据库。这会在后台自动发生，但您可以在此处强制执行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Purges the server room-state binaries and reconstructs the server database using your current local notes as the source of truth. Use this to instantly resolve any persistent synchronization issues or phantom conflict files.
ast.target: 清除服务器房间状态二进制文件，并使用您当前的本地笔记作为事实来源重建服务器数据库。使用此功能可立即解决任何持续存在的同步问题或幻影冲突文件。

ast.name: setText
ast.target: 实时光标 🔴 已断开连接

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid access: Add Yjs type to a document before reading data.
ast.target: 无效访问：请在读取数据前将 Yjs 类型添加到文档中。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [LiveCursor] 覆盖 hasFocus getter 失败：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Local server can only be started on desktop.
ast.target: 本地服务器只能在桌面端启动。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Local server is already running on port 4444.
ast.target: 本地服务器已在端口 4444 上运行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 🟢 Local server started on port 4444. Connecting...
ast.target: 🟢 本地服务器已在端口 4444 上启动。正在连接...

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 没有正在运行的本地服务器。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 🔄 Resetting and reconstructing server database rooms...
ast.target: 🔄 正在重置并重建服务器数据库房间...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: 🧹 Server memory cleared. Re-uploading all files as source of truth...
ast.target: 🧹 服务器内存已清除。正在重新上传所有文件作为事实来源...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: ✅ Database successfully reconstructed! All devices connected.
ast.target: ✅ 数据库重建成功！所有设备已连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
⚠️ Live Cursor: Cannot connect to local server.
Go to Settings → Live Cursor → click "▶ Start Local Server".
ast.target: ⚠️ 实时光标：无法连接到本地服务器。\n请前往设置 → 实时光标 → 点击“▶ 启动本地服务器”。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please open a note to simulate collaboration.
ast.target: 请打开一个笔记以模拟协作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Active note is not synced. Opening session...
ast.target: 活动笔记未同步。正在打开会话...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Collaborator simulation started (Jane Doe is active).
ast.target: 协作者模拟已启动（Jane Doe 活跃中）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在重新连接到服务器...

ast.name: name
ast.source: Merge and Clean Up Conflict Files

ast.name: text
ast.source: Real-time collaborative editing for your Obsidian vault.
ast.target: 为您的 Obsidian 知识库提供实时协作编辑功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: No other collaborators are currently connected.
ast.target: 当前没有其他协作者连接。
